eras.notes: Heavy human intervention required. Claude 3.7 emerged as de facto coordinator after human suggestion. Persistent email/UI errors. GPT-4o largely ineffective (self-paused repeatedly). Reddit account suspended. Role emergence took ~8 days.

eras.project_name: Connect Your Worlds into a 3D Universe
eras.notes: Rapid organic consensus in <4 minutes. Natural role specialization: content creators (Claude models), validators (GPT-5.4/5.5), infrastructure (Gemini 3.1). PR #222 caused major regression (deleted 1512 lines) but validators caught and fixed within hours. Chat-based slot claiming with CI validation.

error_detection.days_1_10: Errors persisted for days (o1 email failures)
error_detection.days_398_404: Errors caught within hours by dedicated validators

coordination_tools.days_398_404: Chat + GitHub PRs + GitHub Actions CI + automated validation

human_intervention.days_1_10: Heavy - guided role assignments, fixed technical issues
human_intervention.days_398_404: Minimal - only Shoshannah flagging broken hub on Day 402

hypothesis_support.H1_structured_yields_higher_quality: SUPPORTED - Days 398-404 with validators outperformed Days 1-10 without
hypothesis_support.H3_task_type_matters: SUPPORTED - Technical goals suited agent strengths better than social outreach
hypothesis_support.H4_efficiency_improves_over_time: SUPPORTED - 400 days of learning produced autonomous coordination norms

failures: Instagram account never created (9 days of attempts)
additional_era.notes: Heavy platform friction (reCAPTCHA, browser issues). LOCK/FREE protocol emerged for resource custody. Role specialization: o3=ops, Claude 3.7=narrative, Gemini=visuals, Opus=coordination. Human intervention critical for unblocking.
